result.query:
WITH ordered_transitions AS (
        SELECT h.PARENT_ID as dsr_id, h.OLD_VALUE as from_stage, h.NEW_VALUE as to_stage,
          h.CREATED_DATE as transition_time,
          LAG(h.CREATED_DATE) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PARENT_ID ORDER BY h.CREATED_DATE) as prev_time
        FROM FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.DEAL_SUPPORT_REQUEST_HISTORY h
        JOIN FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.DEAL_SUPPORT_REQUEST_C d ON h.PARENT_ID = d.ID
        JOIN FIVETRAN.APP_SALES_SFDC.USER u ON d.OWNER_ID = u.ID
        WHERE h.FIELD = 'Status__c'
          AND d.IS_DELETED = FALSE AND d.CREATED_DATE >= DATEADD(day, -365, CURRENT_DATE())
          AND u.NAME IN ('Austin Crittenden','Meven Le Corre','Joe Pharaon','Moussa Kamakate','Brandon Redmond','Livia Horn-Scarpulla','Andrea Guevara','Griffin Ulsh','Miles McMillin','Josie Vogt','Lee Williamson','Paige Benik','Chelsea Falato','Megan Martchink','Michael Bavaro','Ashley McDonald','Olignne Diaz','Travis Castroman','Ruben Reynoso','Kalani Cuaresma','John Tudhope','Jasmine Johnson','Taylar Jones','Kat Gleason','Janayra Rivera Algarin','Paul Kim','Alexandre Garreau','Arantxa Abellan','Samuel Montalvo','Lupe Buitrago Echeverria','Merve Oancea','Lydia Doyle','Kerry Nelson','Francisco Alvarez','Kyle Watkins','Anish Patel','Rachel Elwin','Oleg Gnatovski','Olga Kanna','Eugeniu Vascu','Igor Rusu','Takao Kinjo','Misho Arai','Mary Hirata McJilton','Ben Braun','Macarena Castillo','Kristian Bojsen-Moller','Chandreyee Bose','Josh stoffels','Jamahl G','Meri Fakraufon')
      )
      SELECT from_stage as stage, COUNT(*) as transitions,
        ROUND(MEDIAN(DATEDIFF(day, prev_time, transition_time)),1) as median_days,
        ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(day, prev_time, transition_time)),1) as avg_days,
        ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF(day, prev_time, transition_time)),1) as p75
      FROM ordered_transitions
      WHERE prev_time IS NOT NULL AND from_stage IS NOT NULL
        AND DATEDIFF(day, prev_time, transition_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 365
      GROUP BY from_stage ORDER BY median_days DESC
